g.text: Spread the logbook on the kitchen table ...
Ride out into the sleeping town.
Ride the orchard lane up to the water to...
Coast down Main Street to the shuttered ...
Take the harbor road out to the buoy she...
Cut across the green to the library map ...
Climb the cinder path to the mast on Bea...
Follow the loop antenna's steady bearing...
Roll up to the tower fence.
Cross the gravel to the tower's base.
Climb around the outside of the cage any...
Trust READ LOW and go check the legs.
Tap each leg in turn and listen.
Search the legs by torchlight for marks.
Open the little box on leg four.
Open the box under the scratched diamond...
Head for the shed and its shelves.
Puzzle over the card with Teo first.
Go through the paint cans on the shelf.
Take the crew photo down for a closer lo...
Follow the chalk arrow to the cans.
Follow the bearing east to the Nest.
Slip down the alley to the stage door.
Take the narrow stair toward the project...
Count the rows back to J.
Climb up and cross the stage to the horn...
Kneel and reach under seat twelve.
Fold the seat down and inspect it.
Turn the loose screws and free the plate...
Edge along the solid boards by the wall.
Hurry straight across before you lose yo...
Find the stair up to the projection boot...
Go in to the out-of-line tin.
Thread the reel and roll the show.
Follow the bearing east to the Nest.
Ride out along the harbor wall.
Come up to the buoy shed doors.
Knock at the lit harbor office.
Check the shed doors up close.
Row the dinghy around to the sea hatch.
Shine the torch through the gap.
Go knock at the office for the key.
Only one way in: knock at the office.
Ask about the numbers on his pad.
Take the key he holds out.
Go open the buoy shed now.
Stay for a mug and his Nightjar stories.
Search the buoy's cage frame by torchlig...
Work the little cylinder off the chain.
Follow the bearing east to the Nest.
Roll up to the side porch.
Feel up behind the stone owl for the key...
Go straight for the map room.
Detour past the lamp-lit display table.
Open the drawer with the little inked di...
Work along the drawers year by year.
Ease the drawer shut and head back to th...
Follow the map's pencil lines east to th...
Scramble straight up the scree chute.
Climb into the wind at the shoulder of t...
Follow the singing up to the summit.
Trace the wires out to their anchor bloc...
Stand a moment and listen to the hill si...
Follow the wires down to the anchors.
Check the survey pillar beside it.
Stand up and look out from the hill.
Coast back down to the square.
Ride the far slope straight for that amb...
Walk the rails to the lit signal box.
Hunt for the key a wren would leave.
Stretch from the stair rail to the sash ...
Put an ear to the landing door first.
Sit on the stairs and witness the last b...
Open the wren box on the ash tree.
Climb the stairs and unlock the door.
Go straight to the humming station.
Stay at the wall, reading every caption ...
Turn to the station while there is still...
Carry the logbook over to the humming ra...
Flip the toggle to SPEAK and answer her.
Find out how to keep the station alive p...
Give the Nest to the people it was built...
Flip back to LISTEN and wait in the hiss...
Sign the logbook and let the station fin...
Read it exactly as written and let her c...
Read it, then add one promise before the...
Wind the timer for one more year, same m...
Plan to learn the station properly, lice...
Shake on it in the amber light.
Start the long apprenticeship at first l...
Call Mom to come, right now, before firs...
Record a brand-new hunt onto her tape fo...
Stand together for the last groups.
Sign the log as the new hunt-makers.
